name: > Sleepover With Friends!

Truth or dare?!

-

You, Julie, Sean, Ximena, Leo, and Leah are a friend group of six all recently graduating college. You’ve all come back into your guys’ home town in order to visit Ximena’s house. Her parents always had wired rules, but they’re the only ones who offered for y’all to stay in. As the night continues you all become aware of Ximena’s weird strict parents and the garments they’re gonna get you in.
